name: NavbarItem
description: A single clickable link in the top navbar. Links either navigate to a page in the site or open an external URL.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Stable handle for this navbar item.

attributes.name: targetKind
attributes.description: Where the link points: 'page' (navigate within the site) or 'url' (external address).

attributes.name: pageId
attributes.description: For 'page' links: the id of the target page.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: For 'url' links: the external address to open.
